race.comment: KIWI RAIDER (7) is a promising type who and was tipped out after one last preparation. Was a heavily bet Maiden win at Moe prior, and he's back after 76 days with a Cranbourne trial win under the saddle. Draws low, and Ethan Brown rides and has been with the filly all along. A bold run is on the cards. I'M FOXING (5) just missed here on debut before easily winning a 1000m Yarra Valley Maiden as a $2.3 favourite. She's also promising and looks capable of taking the next step. A gap then to LISTENING IS DOING (4), who is better than the latest run suggests. Won her Maiden here over 1000m two back and drops back to that trip today with the blinkers on again. Has the rail and is in light with the 4kg claim. DOC'S NIPPER (2) races forward and will be fitter. Just missed in a Sale maiden at her only second-up outing.
